steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify power tool rack frame, clamping bar, and lock keys.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify power tool rack frame, clamping bar, and lock keys.

steps.title: Mount Base
steps.content: Secure main rack bracket to trailer rail or wall studs.

es.title: Mount Base
es.content: Secure main rack bracket to trailer rail or wall studs.

steps.title: Lock Chainsaw/Tool
steps.content: Place tool engine base in rack cradle, close clamping bar over handle, and padlock locked.

es.title: Lock Chainsaw/Tool
es.content: Place tool engine base in rack cradle, close clamping bar over handle, and padlock locked.
